source: Anthropic — Claude Code cost documentation (code.claude.com/docs/en/costs), April 2026 update. Figures are per active developer-day across enterprise deployments.

cost_per_active_day_usd.note: Lognormal fitted to the two officially published anchors (mean $13, 90th percentile $30). The implied median is ~$7/active-day. Any p50/p99 shown is interpolated from this fit, not separately published by Anthropic.

tiers.name: Light
tiers.desc: 1-2 sessions/day, single-file tasks, mostly Sonnet, sessions under 30 min

tiers.name: Medium
tiers.desc: 3-5h active/day, multi-file features and refactors, Sonnet with occasional Opus

tiers.name: Power
tiers.desc: multiple instances, automation, agent teams, heavy Opus

pricing_note: Anthropic API list prices per million tokens (Opus 4.5+ at the reduced $5/$25 tier; Opus 4.1 and earlier at $15/$75). Subscription (Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise) usage is included in the plan and not billed per token; these figures estimate the API-equivalent dollar value of the work done.
